videos.title: Highlights Bad Gastein Criterium - Ski Classics Pro Tour XVI
videos.description:
Experience the adrenaline and excitement from the Bad Gastein Criterium, a breathtaking stage in the Ski Classics Pro Tour 2024/2025! 🏔️ Witness world-class cross-country skiers take on the challenging course in the picturesque setting of Sport Gastein, delivering intense competition and unforgettable moments.

In this video, you'll see:
✨ The most thrilling race highlights.
⛷️ Expert techniques and tactics from the pros.
🎥 Stunning footage of the alpine scenery.

📌 Subscribe to SC The Ski Community for more highlights, race recaps, and exclusive Ski Classics content: Subscribe Here: https://www.youtube.com/@sctheskicommunity

videos.title: Ski Classics: Gastein Classics   Kriterium 14. 12. 2025
videos.description:
Ski Classics: Gastein Classics – Kriterium am 14.12.2025 in Sportgastein
Ein äußerst erfolgreiches Langlaufwochenende geht in Sportgastein zu Ende. Die Gastein Classics begeisterten Athlet:innen, Zuschauer:innen und Fans gleichermaßen. Dank internationaler Liveübertragungen nach Norwegen, Schweden und in viele weitere Länder stand Sportgastein einmal mehr im Mittelpunkt der Langlaufwelt.
Bei besten Bedingungen präsentierte sich das hochalpine Langlaufzentrum von seiner schönsten Seite und bot einen würdigen Rahmen für hochklassigen nordischen Skisport.

videos.title: Raiffeisen Gastein Classics Season 2024/2025 I Ski Classics Challengers Event
videos.description:
Relive the best moments from the Raiffeisen Gastein Classics, a thrilling Ski Classics Challenger event held in the stunning alpine landscapes of Gastein! 🏅 Watch as top athletes battle for victory in this cross-country skiing spectacle, showcasing endurance, technique, and pure determination.

In this video, we bring you:
✨ Key highlights from the race.
🏆 Interviews with the skiers.
🎙️ Insights and reactions straight from the finish line.

📌 Subscribe to SC The Ski Community for more highlights, interviews, and exclusive content from the world of Ski Classics: Subscribe here: @sctheskicommunity 

🔗 Learn more about Ski Classics and cross-country skiing:
🌐 Ski Classics Official Website: https://skiclassics.com/
🌐 Langd.se (Swedish): https://www.langd.se/
🌐 Langrenn.com (Norwegian): https://www.langrenn.com/
🌐 Maastohiihto (Finnish): https://www.maastohiihto.com/
🌐 ProXCskiing: https://www.proxcskiing.com/

💬 Join the conversation:
What was your favorite moment from the Raiffeisen Gastein Classics? Share your thoughts in the comments below!
